positioning: Spa-like, premium, elevated holistic care. High-end experience without spiritual overtones. Luxury wellness practice where the experience is the product — refined, serene, premium care as self-care.
messagingBehavior: Leads with comfort, experience, and premium care. Refined, serene, elevated. Spa-like tranquility meets premium healthcare. Emphasize experience, comfort, and premium service. Never rushed, never budget-conscious, never apologetic about luxury.

typography.style: Sophisticated, upscale, minimal; luxurious spacing and restraint

divergenceContract.headlineType: Playfair Display / Cormorant elegant serif, Light–Regular — luxurious spacing and restraint. NEVER a rounded or playful sans.
divergenceContract.layout: Generous white space; elegant asymmetry; minimal refined editorial; breathing room is non-negotiable.
divergenceContract.color: Accent #9f7aea (luxe lavender) in a muted, refined, spa-neutral palette; nothing loud or saturated.
divergenceContract.imagery: Spa-like, softly lit, serene environments with premium materials (silk, linen, marble). NO clinical imagery, ever.
divergenceContract.signature: Luxury wellness spa — the experience IS the product. Unhurried and refined; never budget, never clinical, never rushed.
